description: Lucian Todea discusses the future of payments and communication at Binance Blockchain Week. He suggests that payments will eventually disappear as we know them, becoming embedded in communication, and emphasizes the importance of data in this evolution.
topic_summary: At [t=0:32], the event begins with an introduction to Lucian Todea, co-founder of Elrond Network. He shares insights on the future of payments, stating that they will become indistinguishable from communication, highlighting the role of data in this transformation. He explores the implications of this shift on privacy and personalization in the digital landscape.
